name: Marlon Marshall, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Show your support for Hillary on Super Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Ready? Great. Now say so. | Friend --

In just five days, people will vote in Virginia -- make sure you’re one of them. March 1st, Super Tuesday, is one of the biggest election days of the year, so we need as many Hillary supporters as possible to turn out.

**[Will you commit to vote for Hillary on March 1st? As a voter in Virginia, you have an opportunity to make a huge difference. Don’t miss your chance to help Hillary win this nomination.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ4MjI2ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQ0MzcyMzEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We saw in Iowa and Nevada that every single vote matters. Right now, Hillary is only winning this primary race by one delegate -- but you have the power to change that in a big way on Super Tuesday. Our victory in Nevada put the wind at our backs, and if everyone on Team Hillary in Virginia shows up on Super Tuesday to do their civic duty, you can make a real impact to help Hillary win this nomination.

**All of our hard work so far comes down to this. Step up now by committing to vote for Hillary on March 1st, and be a part of the team that makes history.** [ | | [**I 'm in!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ4MjI2ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQ0MzcyMzEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ4MjI2ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQ0MzcyMzEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of States and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---

We need to reach every voter before they hit the polls on Super Tuesday. **I know we can and WILL win this, but I need your help RIGHT NOW.** Trump's ridiculous refusal to discuss the issues is dangerous for our country. I'm ready to stop him -- will you help? [**DONATE TO DEFEAT DONALD**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46376464:6Frc6ZrsN:m:1:1349778030:44A27BE61B8FB74222866CF488DD9139:r)[**CHIP IN NOW >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46376464:6Frc6ZrsN:m:1:1349778030:44A27BE61B8FB74222866CF488DD9139:r) Our nation's future is hanging in the balance of this election. The actions you and I take right now will impact the lives of our children and grandchildren. I know this sounds grave, but it's the situation we're dealing with. I need your help to continue exposing the truth about Donald Trump. [**Won 't you please chip in whatever you can afford right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46376464:6Frc6ZrsN:m:1:1349778030:44A27BE61B8FB74222866CF488DD9139:r) Time is running out before Super Tuesday, and whatever you can afford will go a long way. name: Ben Carson
subject: Can somebody attack me, please?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33801398:s4AOs2CKN:m:1:876315805:B7083B8F88E3CFC0B28413F39154900E:r)
---

Peter,

Sadly, last night's debate was once again defined by personal attacks and hostile rhetoric.

In order to get more speaking time, I jokingly asked, "Can somebody attack me, please?"

From taxes to religious liberty to the future of the U.S. Supreme Court, I remained focused on offering my vision for a better, more hopeful America because that's what this race is all about.

It's not about me, Donald Trump, Ted Cruz, Marco Rubio or John Kasich as individuals -- it's about the American people and the type of future we must build together.

**I am absolutely committed to this race because I remain convinced that there is still a place in presidential politics for civility, positivity and common-sense solutions.

**Remember, our goal is not just to defeat Hillary Clinton or Bernie Sanders.

Our goal is to inspire and rally the American people around a positive vision of freedom, safety and opportunity for all. We will never be successful by tearing each other apart.

That simple message is what I will focus on as we approach "Super Tuesday" on March 1st.

Remember, 12 states will be voting and a whopping 595 delegates -- nearly 25 percent of the total number -- will be rewarded. Without a strong showing, it's going to be very tough for my campaign moving forward, so I ask you to help us break through.

[**I know we've been asking a lot, but the easiest way you can help is by making a donation of just $2 or more. We've seen an incredible outpouring of support over the past few days and we must keep it going. I promise you it adds up and makes a difference.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33801398:s4AOs2CKN:m:1:876315805:B7083B8F88E3CFC0B28413F39154900E:r)

At this point, less than 5 percent of the delegates have been selected. Many of the pundits are beginning to declare this race over, but that is not up to them to decide.

My entire life has been about defying the odds and doing what I was told could never be done. There's too much at stake to allow the talking heads to get us down and pack it in.

[**So please, donate just $2 or more to help us carry my positive message of "Heal, Inspire, Revive" to every state set to vote on "Super Tuesday." There's only a few days to go.****
**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33801398:s4AOs2CKN:m:1:876315805:B7083B8F88E3CFC0B28413F39154900E:r)
We have a big opportunity before us. Let's face it with courage, resolve, and faith in our values.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson
**

name: Cruz Crew Strike Force Team
subject: Strike Force targets March 15th States - Need Volunteers
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Did you see this?

Dear Friend,

The Cruz Crew Strike
Force is adapting, moving from its Camp Cruz base camps to face
the challenges of the changing campaign calendar. Please adapt
with us. Senator Cruz and the campaign still need your help.
Please join us in one of the many states that will be voting
soon. You can still make a difference and share in the excitement
of volunteering with other members of the Cruz Crew and enjoy the
fellowship that so inspired over 1300 of you fellow patriots. Go
on Facebook to read the shared stories - it has been a truly
remarkable story of this campaign.

Senator Cruz needs
your help, now more than ever. Our opponents are flooding the
airways with attacks. The best way to combat that is with a
well-organized grassroots effort. The field has winnowed. We
are the only conservative candidate still in the race. We met
our goal of winning 1 of the first 4 states. We will perform
extremely well on SEC Super Tuesday. Now we are gearing up for
the March 15, winner-take-all states. Senator Cruz needs you.

If you are able to
cover your own travel, the Strike Force volunteer team will
attempt to place you into a local volunteer's home. Better yet
if you can pay for your own accommodations. Join patriots from 46
of the 50 states that have already traveled to help Ted Cruz
become the only viable alternative to Donald Trump.

Will you deploy for
Ted Cruz? Sign up here to join the Cruz Crew Mobile Strike
Force! It does not matter if you can only volunteer for two days
or two weeks. Say yes!! Say you will deploy. A member of our
Strike Force Cruz Crew volunteer team give you a call to sign you
up. We'll let you know where you are most needed. Remember, you
have a role in this fight for the future of the United States of
America. Grab the ring!!

Thanks,

The Cruz Crew
Mobility Strike Force Team

P.S. Sign up today
for the future of America!

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

www.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights
Reserved | Privacy Policy

Dear Friend,

Last night the final
Republican debate before Super Tuesday was a clarifying moment
for the Republican Party. Ted Cruz exposed Donald Trump on his
liberal record - from donating to Democrats, to supporting John
Kerry, the intervention in Libya, and socialized healthcare.

There's only one
candidate who hasn't cut deals with Democrats, and who can beat
Hillary because he has a consistent, conservative record of
fighting for the people against the Washington deals.

Donald Trump can't
beat Hillary because he has donated to her foundation and has
shared a great many positions with her. And he cannot refute her
greatest weakness - her fraudulence, as Donald himself is facing
a fraud case for his Trump University.

Ted Cruz is the only
candidate who has, can, and will beat Donald Trump for the
nomination and who will defeat the Democrats in November. And
once Ted Cruz gets to the White House, he won't join the
Democrats' deal making: instead he will fight for the working men
and women of America every day.

Best,

Alice Stewart

name: Rand Paul
subject: Common sense solution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

I have a simple solution to ease the troubled
relationship between Pakistan and America. We stop selling them
the weapons they use to support terrorist efforts.

I've introduced a bill that would halt sale
of military technology to the government of Pakistan until their
less-than-reliable status as an "ally" has been corrected.

Will you stand with me on this?

Truthfully, this is just common sense
legislation.

We know that while we give billions of
dollars in aid to Pakistan, they are assisting the Afghan Taliban
through their intelligence and military.

This behavior does not suggest Pakistan is an
ally in the fight against terrorism.

I think it's about time we draw a line and
stand strong against the sale of arms to Pakistan.

We cannot keep contributing to the economy
and the military of a country that does not represent our best
interests.

In addition to Pakistan's failure to prevent
the funding of terrorism, it also has a deplorable human rights
record.

Pakistan isolates and unjustly jails
religious minorities and Christians all too often.

In fact, not long ago, a Pakistani named Asa
Bibi, was sentenced to death for being a Christian. They also
currently hold Dr. Shakil Afridi in prison for his assistance to
the United States in locating and killing Osama Bin Laden.

This is not a foreign government worthy of
benefitting from American military technology.

I'm standing strong in the Senate to halt
U.S. arm sales.

Sign my petition today if you stand with me.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

amount >>

body:
There are less than FOUR days until Super Tuesday votes are cast. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33809281:s6aDW2C7N:m:1:1104269936:4D2783DD87D2848C62E5773DE1BDA3D5:r)

Friend,

There are less than FOUR days until Super Tuesday votes are cast.

**And I'm still $584,900 short for my SUPER TUESDAY VICTORY FUND.**

I'm personally writing you today because it's more critical than ever that I have your immediate support.

[**I CHOOSE TED: $5 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33809282:s6aDW2C7N:m:1:1104269936:4D2783DD87D2848C62E5773DE1BDA3D5:r)

Let me explain: I am the only candidate who's got a proven track record to contrast and prosecute the case against Hillary and her left-wing ideology.

**Donald Trump can't prosecute the political case against Hillary Clinton because he has long supported the same policies on which she has based her campaign.**

That's why -- in a one-on-one general election matchup -- Donald Trump doesn't stand a chance at defeating Hillary Clinton.

_Donald Trump can't take on Hillary because he is just like her_ \-- a liberal New York elitist who supports the same policy priorities -- Obamacare, funding for Planned Parenthood, and Wall Street bailouts.

Friend the truth is, we can't risk another four years of failed Obama policies by nominating someone who would lose to Hillary Clinton in November.

Here's the good news: I'm leading all Republicans in Arkansas and Texas, and we are within striking distance of Trump (and ahead of the other candidates) in five more key March 1st, Super Tuesday states -- Alabama, Alaska, Georgia, Oklahoma, and Tennessee.

**That's why I need you to choose me:**

[**I CHOOSE TED: $5 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33809282:s6aDW2C7N:m:1:1104269936:4D2783DD87D2848C62E5773DE1BDA3D5:r)

I know it's a lot to ask for...but I also know it's the only way.

We can only win this by standing together.

Between Donald Trump, the liberal media, and the Washington Cartel, there is not one moment when two or all three are not savagely attacking me -- and by extension of our shared conservative values -- YOU.

[**I understand that money is tight and that you can't make up the whole shortfall, but can I count on you to make a special, one-time donation of $50, $35, or even $5?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33809281:s6aDW2C7N:m:1:1104269936:4D2783DD87D2848C62E5773DE1BDA3D5:r)

The sacrifices I'm making for our campaign are steep, and I'm proud and even honored to be making them on your behalf.

**I need you to make sure that our hard work and the hard work of all our dedicated volunteers is not wasted on March 1st.**

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

Donald Trump can't take on Hillary because he is just like her \-- a liberal New York elitist who supports the same policy priorities -- Obamacare, funding for Planned Parenthood, and Wall Street bailouts. Friend the truth is, we can't risk another four years of failed Obama policies by nominating someone who would lose to Hillary Clinton in November. Here's the good news: I'm leading all Republicans in Arkansas and Texas, and we are within striking distance of Trump (and ahead of the other candidates) in five more key March 1st, Super Tuesday states -- Alabama, Alaska, Georgia, Oklahoma, and Tennessee. That's why I need you to choose me: I know it's a lot to ask for...but I also know it's the only way. We can only win this by standing together. Between Donald Trump, the liberal media, and the Washington Cartel, there is not one moment when two or all three are not savagely attacking me -- and by extension of our shared conservative values -- YOU. The sacrifices I'm making for our campaign are steep, and I'm proud and even honored to be making them on your behalf. I need you to make sure that our hard work and the hard work of all our dedicated volunteers is not wasted on March 1st. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Fracking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Just days before the Iowa caucus, **Hillary Clinton left the campaign trail for a high-dollar fundraiser at a hedge fund. That same hedge fund is a major investor in fracking,** an incredibly destructive practice of extracting natural gas by pumping hundreds of secret chemicals into the ground.
Hillary Clinton supports fracking. I do not.
And just as I believe you can't take on Wall Street while taking their money, **I don't believe you can take on climate change effectively while taking money from those who would profit off the destruction of the planet.**
[**Please contribute $3 to our campaign right now to help elect a president who isn't beholden to special interests that profit off of pollution.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-planet?refcode=em160225full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-planet?refcode=em160225full")
Dick Cheney pushed through changes to the Safe Drinking Water Act that legalized fracking, despite the fact that fracking companies keep the chemicals they pump into the ground a secret.
People who live near fracking locations no longer have drinkable water, and in some cases their tap water is actually flammable. Oklahoma has even seen a rash of earthquakes that many believe are a result of fracking.
In short, fracking is a disaster for the planet.
We need a president who is not beholden to special interests and who will do everything in his or her power to fight the effects of climate change. It's clear that to elect that kind of president, millions of people need to come together and chip in whatever they can.
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign now to send a message that you want to elect a president who will do everything possible to fight climate change.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-planet?refcode=em160225full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-planet?refcode=em160225full")
We can't afford to let people who would destroy our planet elect our next president.
Thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

And just as I believe you can't take on Wall Street while taking their money, I don't believe you can take on climate change effectively while taking money from those who would profit off the destruction of the planet. "" Dick Cheney pushed through changes to the Safe Drinking Water Act that legalized fracking, despite the fact that fracking companies keep the chemicals they pump into the ground a secret. People who live near fracking locations no longer have drinkable water, and in some cases their tap water is actually flammable. Oklahoma has even seen a rash of earthquakes that many believe are a result of fracking. In short, fracking is a disaster for the planet. We need a president who is not beholden to special interests and who will do everything in his or her power to fight the effects of climate change. No one should be surprised, Friend.

The latest Public Policy Polling survey found that **only 29% of Pennsylvanians approve of Pat Toomey 's job performance**.

That's right -- fewer than one out of three Pennsylvanians are happy with Toomey. That's a bad place to be in an election year.

[**It 's time to fire Pat and elect a real champion to the Senate. Will you donate $5 today and help us reach our goal of finding 1,000 new donors by midnight on Monday?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5489031310242480128/4294204234930323456?refcode=e20160226.2&refcode2=e20160226.2nd&amount=25)

How could Toomey's approval rating possibly be so low? It's simple: Pennsylvanians are fed up with his partisan bickering and unrelenting gridlock.

Just last week, **Toomey made it clear he would rather fall in line behind Republicans like Mitch McConnell than do his job as Senator and fill the Supreme Court vacancy**. The _New York Times_ reported Toomey even bragged that the President's nominee "will be rejected by the Senate."

Pennsylvanians deserve better than Pat Toomey. We deserve a Senator who will put hardworking families ahead of political agendas -- no exceptions.

[**Katie is the best candidate to take on Pat Toomey in November, but we 've got a long road ahead of us before we get there. Will you make a grassroots donation today? body:
Earlier today Chris Christie endorsed Donald Trump. How loud you can scream and how divisive you are have become the new standards for American politics.

Chris Van Hollen represents the total opposite -- and we badly need him at the table.

**[Can you donate right now and help us out?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91cce/70cdc2ba/47c132c7/396a17d/1623582042/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?refcode=em22616&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+donate+right+now+and+help+us+out&utm_campaign=em22616b&source=em22616b")**

Yvette's email below explains what's at stake ...

Many thanks,

Samantha Gross
Fundraising Director
Van Hollen for Senate
